localization.name: Quick Strike
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Then the user has their current TU reduced by 50TU. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

localization.name: Elegant Thrust
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward.

Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, Deadly Dance is unlocked.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.
localization.selected: 500% damage, gains wards, may unlock Deadly Dance

localization.name: Deadly Dance
localization.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Then the user has their current TU reduced by 50TU.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Elegant Thrust. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Dance Training
localization.description:
Purifies (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison) all allies on the battlefield. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 5 but less than 10, a random ally is Enraged, and given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.
- 10, all allies are Enraged, and given the next turns by reducing their current TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
localization.selected: Purify, Gain Spirit, May Grant Turn

localization.name: Dancing Sword
localization.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks ignore Guardians, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, Earth or Dark, Stun them for 100TU, and grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU.
- Fire, Storm or Light, Weaken them, and grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified. Then all other allies are given the next turns by reducing their current TU. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Mega Poison and Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

localization.name: Charged Dance
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Charge, Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, and a Poison Ward. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit is granted a Charge.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Charge stored on this unit (e.g. Deadly Dance: 700% => 1000% damage with 3 Charges are stored).

This unit has 50% damage reduction.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack, and survives until after the end of the turn, if this unit is charged, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 1% of max HP. Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.
